author: Harry
description:
Dynamic Unit Overview

This mod enhances gameplay by introducing unit specialization, diversification, and dozens of new units and effects, creating a richer and more immersive military experience.

---Companion Mods---
Dynamic World, Dynamic Battlefield, Middle Kingdom Map, Morale Mod, and Battlegear. This mod has been tested with the base game and various combinations of DLCs. It is available in English and German (thanks to Groo) and features unique artwork, icons for all new units (thanks to And).

---Headline Features---
Specialized Troops: 
	14 new units and 23 new promotions. 
	Comprehensive specialization rebalance for elite troops (e.g., Warrior Monks).
Technology Revamp:
	Diffusion: Technologies are initially expensive for the first nation to research but gradually decrease in cost as more nations discover them.
	Revamped tech tree for balance, thematic alignment, and clarity.
Tribal Alliance Enhancement:
	Allied tribes will continue raiding enemy factions while maintaining peace with rogue groups (e.g., Raiders and Barbarians).
AI Enhancements:
	AI gameplay becomes unique with each match, showcasing greater focus on diversified elite units.


---Other Notable Features---
New events, technologies, and laws.
Customized unit formations and visuals.
Dynamic XP gain based on battle outcomes.
Battlefield Promotions: Units may earn bonus promotions based on performance in specific battles.
Realistic economy: prices are now tied to an elusive world economy, with the Old World exporting/importing goods from afar should prices ever get too high/low
New Unit Mechanic:
     Stationary Towers: 30HP, 5-7 strength, immobile, and capable of ranged harassment—ideal for picking off weaker units
     Mountaineers: Can traverse mountain tiles and enable other units to cross mountains.
Victory point goalposts are now obfuscated, offering a range rather than a fixed number to encourage players to leave behind thriving empires upon victory.
Units can now reach a maximum level of 9, making elite units significantly more powerful than recruits.
New unit-generating improvements.
Archetypes and families provide unique wartime benefits.
Promotions, generals, and leaders strongly influence unit effectiveness, elevating elite units to formidable assets.
Defense, terrain advantages, and ranged support play crucial roles in shaping combat strategy.
Expanded use of AoE (area of effect) attacks and specialized effects for military classes.
Tribal units have been strengthened to withstand assaults from nations.
Large tooltip and in-game pedia entries ensure smooth gameplay.


---Design Philosophy---
Quality Over Quantity: 
	Elite units are deadly compared to recruits, with leveling, promotions, and tactical advantages allowing lone units to stand against hordes.
	Units are carefully differentiated, avoiding overwhelming players with repetitive content.
Transparency:
	All unit effects are clearly stated in in-game text to help players plan strategies confidently, without relying on guesswork or tribal knowledge.
	Added tooltips, pedia entries and Concepts for easy to understand and fully documented game experience
Defense and Attrition:
	Cities are more defensible, with barbarian horsemen unable to easily overwhelm them.
	AI capitals require a well-thought-out strategy to conquer, even with decisive terrain advantage.


Thank you for exploring my mod! For any questions or feedback, you can find me on the Old World Discord as Harry!#5866.
